---
title: "PHB228 Homework 1"
author: "Your Name"
date: "2026-04-28"
format: html
---

# Overview

This file is the homework template. Rename `hw1_your_PID.qmd` to `hw1_[your_PID].qmd`, then add your code and explanations below.

## 1. Problem 1

Write your answer here.

## 2. Problem 2

Write your answer here.

## 3. Problem 3

Write your answer here.
